╰──────────☠☢☠─────────╯


╭────────────☠☢☠────────────╮

[Yuri]

Yuliana, born in Russia, died in Russia. The cold winters broke her down into a shivering mess.

Debt collectors, huh? Well they're gone now. I Miss you Mom, Dad.

Why can't I just be happy? Why can't I..?

A Knife held in her hand dripping blood, gun barrel still smoking, her eyes cold and lifeless as she stared at the corpse. "Tch, you're pathetic."
She had avenged her parents. Now what? I Mean, the mob boss was dead. Now she owned the place... Well she didn't have a single subordinate since she killed everyone.

Crates? "Kay-Sis?" She muttered to herself in horrible English. And then an Idea. She'll "Die" and be "Reborn" So, with the blood money, she took the crates of ammo and guns, faked her death, moved abroad, bribed people.

Her first gun deal was actually, the most annoying one she had. Her horrible English did not help to sell, her Russian always sounded angry, to be fair. She was still angry that time. Lonely. Empty. But she sold the crates. And for the first time in years. She felt... Joy?

And that started her gunrunning business. She ran it on pure adrenaline and absolute joy when she sold a crate.
It wasn't for the money. It was for the emotion. And now, she's just a happy little lad to everyone.

But when her life is in danger..? Safe to say no one will come out alive.
